artifacts.rendering_policy: Visible artifact is rendered through Material UI from the reviewed handoff plus compiled frontend skill context.
artifacts.approach_title: GPT-5.5 xhigh via codex exec - JudgmentKit skill + Material UI
artifacts.approach_caption: GPT-5.5 xhigh via codex exec receives the reviewed handoff plus compiled frontend skill context, then renders through the Material UI adapter. This is the full intended path.

generation_policy: Static captured-fixture pack. Website builds copy committed artifacts and never call a live model. The 3x4 matrix separates raw brief context, JudgmentKit reviewed handoff plus compiled frontend skill context, Material UI rendering, and the combined JudgmentKit skill plus Material UI path.
